title: The DISTURBING History Of Skinwalker Ranch Revealed
summary: This interview covers the history and paranormal phenomena associated with Skinwalker Ranch in Utah's Uinta Basin. It discusses the origins of the 'Skinwalker' legend stemming from a Navajo curse placed on the land following a conflict with the Ute tribe during the Civil War era.

key_claims.claim: During the Civil War, the Utes partnered with the U.S government in a battle against the Navajo
Following their defeat, the Navajo cursed the local land with Skinwalkers
Skinwalkers are malevolent shape-shifting entities that can take various forms but often resemble demonic werewolves
